name: Ubon ring road / Central Ubon / Chae Ramae core
capture_notes: Highest current seed AADT point is Route 231 Ubon ring road at 44,325 AADT. Strong mixed retail, city, airport-side, and bypass demand; competition likely meaningful.

name: Route 2050 Ubon - Trakan Phuet Phon north axis
capture_notes: Route 2050 shows 41,822 AADT near Ubon and 34,814 farther out. Good for north-side city/district movement and roadside destination charging.

name: Warin Chamrap rail / Route 24 south gateway
capture_notes: Combines Warin Chamrap population, rail terminal, Route 24 Det Udom-Ubon flow at 30,091 AADT, and south/southwest intercity demand.

name: Ubon downtown / river / airport core
capture_notes: Urban hotel, government, airport, riverfront, food, and hospital demand. Good for destination DC where access/parking are strong.

name: Route 212 east/north Mekong corridor
capture_notes: Route 212 has 23,095 and 22,148 AADT points toward Ubon/Nong Yo. Supports district and Mekong-side travel demand.

name: Det Udom / Route 24 south district axis
capture_notes: Det Udom is a large district and Route 24 gateway. Better for intercity coverage and district demand than central utilization.

name: Sirindhorn / Chong Mek border and tourism axis
capture_notes: Chong Mek is Ubon's Laos border gateway and Sirindhorn Reservoir tourism zone. Demand is more route/tourism/border-driven and needs charger audit.
